findings.summary: No recurring argument confusion patterns crossed the emission threshold.
findings.title: Argument mismatch patterns

uncertainty.explanation: The dataset could evaluate this claim, but no pattern crossed the emission threshold strongly enough to emit a product finding.
uncertainty.headline: Weak signal
uncertainty.label: Weak signal
uncertainty.rationale: Dataset can compare expected schema against observed arguments with enough fidelity for typed mismatch claims.

suppressedFindings.summary: Dead-tool findings stay quiet until the dataset has enough sessions to avoid day-one false positives.
suppressedFindings.title: Dead tools

uncertainty.explanation: The dataset does not support this claim. Dataset can support unused-tool claims because the registered tool inventory is authoritative. Blocked by: insufficient_session_count.
uncertainty.headline: Unsupported signal
uncertainty.label: Unsupported
uncertainty.rationale: Dataset can support unused-tool claims because the registered tool inventory is authoritative.

suppressedFindings.summary: Termination analysis stays quiet until enough sessions exist to distinguish dead ends from noise.
suppressedFindings.title: Session termination analysis

uncertainty.explanation: The dataset does not support this claim. Dataset supports identifying where sessions end and which tools correlate with dead ends. Blocked by: insufficient_session_count.
uncertainty.headline: Unsupported signal
uncertainty.label: Unsupported
uncertainty.rationale: Dataset supports identifying where sessions end and which tools correlate with dead ends.

suppressedFindings.summary: Sequence findings stay quiet until Pathloom has enough repeated ordered paths to compare against baseline behavior.
suppressedFindings.title: Sequence risk map

uncertainty.explanation: The dataset does not support this claim. Dataset supports comparing sequence outcomes against baseline behavior. Blocked by: insufficient_sequence_observations.
uncertainty.headline: Unsupported signal
uncertainty.label: Unsupported
uncertainty.rationale: Dataset supports comparing sequence outcomes against baseline behavior.

suppressedFindings.summary: Client divergence needs at least two meaningfully represented clients before differences can be trusted.
suppressedFindings.title: Client divergence

uncertainty.explanation: The dataset does not support this claim. Dataset can compare tool usage and outcomes across normalized clients. Blocked by: insufficient_client_variety.
uncertainty.headline: Unsupported signal
uncertainty.label: Unsupported
uncertainty.rationale: Dataset can compare tool usage and outcomes across normalized clients.

suppressedFindings.summary: Activation findings stay quiet until privacy-safe actor linkage is actually present in the observed event stream, not just declared in the dataset profile.
suppressedFindings.title: Activation tool report

uncertainty.explanation: The dataset does not support this claim. Dataset supports privacy-safe return-cohort analysis for activation-style findings. Blocked by: missing_observed_actor_linkage.
uncertainty.headline: Unsupported signal
uncertainty.label: Unsupported
uncertainty.rationale: Dataset supports privacy-safe return-cohort analysis for activation-style findings.
